hooks.command: if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] && [ -x "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/install.sh" ]; then "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/install.sh"; elif [ -x ./scripts/install.sh ]; then ./scripts/install.sh; else echo "[aws-mcp] SessionStart install hook skipped: plugin root is unavailable" >&2; fi
